infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: UniLease needs access to your photo library so you can attach a listing image.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: UniLease uses Face ID only to unlock the app. Your face data stays on device; we only receive pass or fail.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: UniLease uses location to recommend the closest campus handover zone.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: UniLease can monitor active handover proximity during a booking.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: UniLease uses motion data to support item condition checks during handover.

plugins.photosPermission: UniLease needs access to your photos to attach a listing image.
plugins.cameraPermission: UniLease can use the camera if you choose to take a new listing photo.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: UniLease uses location to recommend and monitor campus handover zones.
